name: my-codex-harness
description: A reusable engineering workflow for building reliable Codex projects.

interface.shortDescription: A reliable engineering workflow for Codex projects.
interface.longDescription: An owner-activated workflow for requirements, planning, isolated implementation, independent review, integration, documentation, and completion.
defaultPrompt: Harness is dormant by default. Explicitly invoke $init-project, $to-exec-plan, $orchestrator, or $complete-project; use /harness run or /harness resume for a full run. Ordinary tasks remain normal Codex work.
